rule_metadata.name: Mozi_Obfuscation_Technique
rule_metadata.author: Elastic Security, Lars Wallenborn (@larsborn)
rule_metadata.description: Detects obfuscation technique used by Mozi botnet.

rules.rule_text:
rule Mozi_Obfuscation_Technique
{
	meta:
		author = "Elastic Security, Lars Wallenborn (@larsborn)"
		description = "Detects obfuscation technique used by Mozi botnet."
		reference = "https://www.elastic.co/security-labs/collecting-and-operationalizing-threat-data-from-the-mozi-botnet"

	strings:
		$a = { 55 50 58 21
           [4]
           00 00 00 00
           00 00 00 00
           00 00 00 00 }

	condition:
		all of them
}
